# 復原 LVM 磁碟區 (LVM Volume Recovery)

如果因為 `fdisk` 的操作不當導致 LVM 的 metadata 損毀，使得機器無法正常開機（且尚未進行格式化），在有另一台組態相同機器的情況下，可藉由複製該機器的 LVM 資訊來進行復原。

## 1. 查詢相同機器的 LVM 資訊

首先，取得另一台相同機器的 PV UUID 資訊：

```bash
pvs -o +pv_uuid

  PV         VG Fmt  Attr PSize   PFree PV UUID
  /dev/sda2  rl lvm2 a--  <19.00g    0  TnfOxE-suri-Sfkt-JvQA-zX5G-pcGh-g0GeiA
```

接著，取得該台機器的 LVM 備份設定檔內容（通常位於 `/etc/lvm/backup/` 底下）：
```bash
cat /etc/lvm/backup/vg_name
# Generated by LVM2 version 2.03.23(2) (2023-11-21): Fri Apr 10 07:00:31 2026

contents = "Text Format Volume Group"
version = 1

description = "Created *after* executing 'vgchange -aay --autoactivation event rl'"

creation_host = "test"      # Linux test 5.14.0-427.13.1.el9_4.x86_64 #1 SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Wed May 1 19:11:28 UTC 2024 x86_64
creation_time = 1775818831      # Fri Apr 10 07:00:31 2026

rl {
        id = "RrWiEu-lMQO-4fAs-zH6v-vg2f-yUQ2-QSggzv"
        seqno = 3
        format = "lvm2"                 # informational
        status = ["RESIZEABLE", "READ", "WRITE"]
        flags = []
        extent_size = 8192              # 4 Megabytes
        max_lv = 0
        max_pv = 0
        metadata_copies = 0

        physical_volumes {

                pv0 {
                        id = "TnfOxE-suri-Sfkt-JvQA-zX5G-pcGh-g0GeiA"
                        device = "/dev/sda2"    # Hint only

                        status = ["ALLOCATABLE"]
                        flags = []
                        dev_size = 39843840     # 18.999 Gigabytes
                        pe_start = 2048
                        pe_count = 4863 # 18.9961 Gigabytes
                }
        }

        logical_volumes {

                swap {
                        id = "92Ljwc-8cR5-tdny-mEUb-4Zjo-I7kE-Sevqd6"
                        status = ["READ", "WRITE", "VISIBLE"]
                        flags = []
                        creation_time = 1775818554      # 2026-04-10 06:55:54 -0400
                        creation_host = "test"
                        segment_count = 1

                        segment1 {
                                start_extent = 0
                                extent_count = 512      # 2 Gigabytes

                                type = "striped"
                                stripe_count = 1        # linear

                                stripes = [
                                        "pv0", 0
                                ]
                        }
                }

                root {
                        id = "IoQfwk-eGve-CLhl-fSqH-Jocj-Rgts-Jw5lgO"
                        status = ["READ", "WRITE", "VISIBLE"]
                        flags = []
                        creation_time = 1775818554      # 2026-04-10 06:55:54 -0400
                        creation_host = "test"
                        segment_count = 1

                        segment1 {
                                start_extent = 0
                                extent_count = 4351     # 16.9961 Gigabytes

                                type = "striped"
                                stripe_count = 1        # linear

                                stripes = [
                                        "pv0", 512
                                ]
                        }
                }
        }

}

```
## 2. 利用 ISO 開機進入救援模式 (Rescue Mode)

使用安裝光碟或 ISO 映像檔開機後，選擇 `Troubleshoot` -> `Rescue a XXXX Linux system`。


在提示選單中，輸入 `3` 選擇直接跳至 Shell (`Skip to shell`)，然後按 Enter 進入 Shell。

## 3. 利用 scp 傳輸 LVM 設定檔

```bash
scp root@<IP>:/etc/lvm/backup/<vg_name> /tmp/rescue.bk
```

## 4. 根據備份檔重建 Physical Volume (PV)

```bash
pvcreate --uuid <PV UUID> /dev/sda2 --restorefile /tmp/rescue.bk
```

## 5. 執行 Volume Group (VG) 還原與啟用

```bash
vgcfgrestore -f /tmp/rescue.bk <vg_name>
vgchange -ay 
```

## 6.執行 lsblk 檢查 LVM 磁碟區是否成功還原

```bash
lsblk
```

## 7. 重新開機

```bash
reboot
```
